scenarioName: Allow sterile verdict only when all gates pass

steps.action: Live Gemini reviewed Allow sterile verdict only when all gates pass
steps.targetSurface: Markdown report review and CLI evidence review
steps.expectedResult: The verdict should not be 'STERILE DOMAIN BODY' when generic utility methods or other violations are present in the domain body.
steps.observedResult: The system returned 'STERILE DOMAIN BODY' even when a generic utility method was detected in the domain body, violating the gate requirements.
